one_law: Auto routing may recommend the best ROI model by role, but explicit user or product model locks must win unless the selected model fails.

explicit_lock_policy.brain_chat: request body model wins before worker env default and fallback chain
explicit_lock_policy.forge_terminal: user-selected model wins before smart route recommendation
explicit_lock_policy.chat_unify: per-turn explicit model wins before smart route recommendation

fallback_policy: try explicit model first when supplied
fallback only on provider failure, timeout, or unavailable key
fallback stays inside same role where possible
T4 critical models require explicit critical role or restricted approval
forbidden: defaulting to a future candidate without a real api_model
promoting a brand-name model without ROI receipt
